top_signals.title: Japan and Korea deepen ties as energy crisis escalates
top_signals.summary: Sanae Takaichi and Lee Jae Myung have proven pragmatic in office as they pursue warmer ties
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman Sachs Intl. Says Europe Has a 'Huge Opportunity'
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs International co-CEOs Anthony Gutman and Kunal Shah discuss the outlook for Europe's capital markets, risks facing the global economy and the race to build out artificial intelligence infrastructure. They speak on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: White House adds generic drugs to direct-to-consumer TrumpRx site
top_signals.summary: Trump said he is increasing the number of products on the platform by nearly seven times, adding more than 600 generic drugs to the site.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trafigura-Backed Terrafame Studies Producing Scandium in Finland
top_signals.summary: Metals firm Terrafame is studying starting producing scandium, a material used in sectors including defense, from its existing uranium operation in Finland, as Europe seeks to secure supplies of critical minerals.

top_signals.title: Fund Managers Boost Stock Allocations by a Record in BofA Poll
top_signals.summary: Fund managers chasing the powerful rally in equities increased their allocations to stocks by the most on record this month, a Bank of America Corp. survey showed.
